title: Mining Drills & Tools NeoForge
description: Adds New Drills, 10x10 - 12x12 - 19x19 - 100x100 , Building blocks, And More Usefull Items & Tools!
body:
View the whole mod description on CurseForge!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-drills


# Information 💬
**Mining Drills Adds total: ( 21 ) new drills to your minecraft server!** 
Replace your pickaxe with a 10x10 or a 20x20 drill. The choice is yours! This mod was made for the reason that we would like to have a better drill mod ourselves. Enjoy mining :)

![neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52e8c02be3fdd667852b896468f00468aca4653.webp)


![update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e83ede4c660dbb08339fc0b45d09bb29373551f.png)

New in: 1.55.19

![tab 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e51aa38d9133f338f9adc2dab78d7eb716df032.png)
![tab 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf7dc322754701e14a96313b49a319192c9da03c.png)
![tab 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/379ae548d67b96f0236f5e12b1eb5cc7bbd69a42.png)
![tab 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5554bb782f0585b58cd399646d605f600a150a70.png)

#  Compatible Information For You ℹ️

**Fully compatible with other enchanted book mods.
The tools only work on stone blocks. no gravel or sand etc.**

**You are allowed to use this mod in your mod packs.**

![warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e69da4d6277274df67825e029865bed4e3d4c4c9.png)

Please note! Using the Physics Mod can cause lag while destroying blocks. We recommend turning it off. ❗️
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
